title: Golf Tournament — Individual (Senior Championship style)
description: GolfGenius-style multi-round leaderboard for individual stroke-play tournaments. Mimics https://lbgf-2026seniorchampionship1.golfgenius.com style: flight accordions, click player → expand inline 3-round scorecards with score color marks (red circles = under par, navy squares = over par).

settings.customHtml:
⛳

Tournament Results — Individual

Click any player name to see their hole-by-hole scorecards

widgetProps.masterQuery:
WITH dates AS (
  SELECT TOP 3 EventDate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY EventDate DESC) AS rn
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT EventDate FROM Golf.dbo.CardResultNew) d
  ORDER BY EventDate DESC
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    LTRIM(RTRIM(c.DisplayName)) AS PlayerName,
    MIN(c.Flight) AS Flight,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.rn = 1 THEN c.Gross END) AS R1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.rn = 2 THEN c.Gross END) AS R2,
    SUM(CASE WHEN d.rn = 3 THEN c.Gross END) AS R3,
    SUM(c.Gross) AS Gross,
    SUM(c.Net) AS Net,
    SUM(c.Gross) - (72 * COUNT(DISTINCT d.rn)) AS ToParRaw
  FROM Golf.dbo.CardResultNew c
  JOIN dates d ON d.EventDate = c.EventDate
  WHERE c.EventNo = 1
  GROUP BY LTRIM(RTRIM(c.DisplayName))
  HAVING SUM(c.Gross) > 0
)
SELECT
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ToParRaw ASC, Gross ASC) AS [Pos.],
  PlayerName AS Player,
  CONCAT('Flight ', Flight) AS Flight,
  CASE WHEN ToParRaw > 0 THEN '+' + CAST(ToParRaw AS varchar) ELSE CAST(ToParRaw AS varchar) END AS [Total To Par],
  R1, R2, R3,
  Gross AS [Total Gross]
FROM agg
ORDER BY ToParRaw ASC, Gross ASC
widgetProps.detail1Query:
WITH dates AS (
  SELECT TOP 3 EventDate FROM (SELECT DISTINCT EventDate FROM Golf.dbo.CardResultNew) d ORDER BY EventDate DESC
)
SELECT
  CONVERT(varchar(20), c.EventDate, 107) AS roundLabel,
  CONCAT(LTRIM(RTRIM(ec.GolfCourse)), ' (', LTRIM(RTRIM(ec.Tees)), ' - Men)') AS courseName,
  LTRIM(RTRIM(ec.Tees)) AS tee,
  CONCAT(ec.Slope, ' / ', ec.Rating) AS slopeRating,
  LTRIM(RTRIM(c.Hdcp)) AS handicap,
  LTRIM(RTRIM(c.DisplayName)) AS playerName,
  c.Score1 AS h1, c.Score2 AS h2, c.Score3 AS h3, c.Score4 AS h4, c.Score5 AS h5,
  c.Score6 AS h6, c.Score7 AS h7, c.Score8 AS h8, c.Score9 AS h9,
  c.Score10 AS h10, c.Score11 AS h11, c.Score12 AS h12, c.Score13 AS h13,
  c.Score14 AS h14, c.Score15 AS h15, c.Score16 AS h16, c.Score17 AS h17, c.Score18 AS h18,
  ec.Hole1Par AS h1P, ec.Hole2Par AS h2P, ec.Hole3Par AS h3P, ec.Hole4Par AS h4P, ec.Hole5Par AS h5P,
  ec.Hole6Par AS h6P, ec.Hole7Par AS h7P, ec.Hole8Par AS h8P, ec.Hole9Par AS h9P,
  ec.Hole10Par AS h10P, ec.Hole11Par AS h11P, ec.Hole12Par AS h12P, ec.Hole13Par AS h13P,
  ec.Hole14Par AS h14P, ec.Hole15Par AS h15P, ec.Hole16Par AS h16P, ec.Hole17Par AS h17P, ec.Hole18Par AS h18P,
  ec.Hole1Yardage AS h1Y, ec.Hole2Yardage AS h2Y, ec.Hole3Yardage AS h3Y, ec.Hole4Yardage AS h4Y, ec.Hole5Yardage AS h5Y,
  ec.Hole6Yardage AS h6Y, ec.Hole7Yardage AS h7Y, ec.Hole8Yardage AS h8Y, ec.Hole9Yardage AS h9Y,
  ec.Hole10Yardage AS h10Y, ec.Hole11Yardage AS h11Y, ec.Hole12Yardage AS h12Y, ec.Hole13Yardage AS h13Y,
  ec.Hole14Yardage AS h14Y, ec.Hole15Yardage AS h15Y, ec.Hole16Yardage AS h16Y, ec.Hole17Yardage AS h17Y, ec.Hole18Yardage AS h18Y,
  ec.Hole1Handicap AS h1SI, ec.Hole2Handicap AS h2SI, ec.Hole3Handicap AS h3SI, ec.Hole4Handicap AS h4SI, ec.Hole5Handicap AS h5SI,
  ec.Hole6Handicap AS h6SI, ec.Hole7Handicap AS h7SI, ec.Hole8Handicap AS h8SI, ec.Hole9Handicap AS h9SI,
  ec.Hole10Handicap AS h10SI, ec.Hole11Handicap AS h11SI, ec.Hole12Handicap AS h12SI, ec.Hole13Handicap AS h13SI,
  ec.Hole14Handicap AS h14SI, ec.Hole15Handicap AS h15SI, ec.Hole16Handicap AS h16SI, ec.Hole17Handicap AS h17SI, ec.Hole18Handicap AS h18SI,
  ec.OutYardage AS outYard, ec.InYardage AS inYard, ec.TotalYardage AS totalYard,
  ec.OutPar AS outPar, ec.InPar AS inPar, ec.TotalPar AS par,
  c.Front AS outTotal, c.Back AS inTotal, c.Gross AS total, c.Net AS net
FROM Golf.dbo.CardResultNew c
LEFT JOIN Golf.dbo.EventCourse ec ON ec.EventDate = c.EventDate AND ec.EventNum = c.EventNo
INNER JOIN dates d ON d.EventDate = c.EventDate
WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(c.DisplayName)) = :parentId
ORDER BY c.EventDate DESC
